# Weekly Status Update Template

## Purpose
Provide a consistent, scannable status update for stakeholders each week. Send via the agreed channel (Slack, email, or GitHub Discussion) and link to the source-of-truth project board or README.

## How to use
1. PM completes this template every week before the weekly delivery sync.
2. Post or share in the agreed channel.
3. Archive the update (e.g., append to a `status-updates/` folder or a GitHub Discussion thread) so there is a history.

---

## Status Update — Week of YYYY-MM-DD

**Project**: _Project name_
**PM**: @mention
**Overall status**: 🟢 On Track / 🟡 At Risk / 🔴 Off Track
